title: janaador0827-commits/simulacra-forge
summary: Top Autonomous Multi-Agent Dialogue Systems for AI Character Emergence (2026)

title: kalyanjanumpally/sap-joule-procurement-copilot
summary: Reference implementation: SAP Joule procurement copilot backed by a CAP AI service and an LLM-agnostic plugin (Anthropic / Ollama / SAP Generative AI Hub).

title: Bike4Mind/bike4mind
summary: The open-core AI workbench — notebooks, agents, RAG, voice, and images across any model: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, or local via Ollama/vLLM. BSL 1.1,  auto-converting to Apache-2.0 on a two-year clock. Your AI keeps running when theirs doesn't.

title: Navibyte-Innovations-Pvt-Ltd/gai-tools
summary: AI-powered git auto-commit for macOS — stage files, they commit themselves using local Ollama

title: loblawbob873-svg/posterchanai
summary: Self-hosted AI assistant & bot platform — streaming chat with local or cloud LLMs (Ollama/llama.cpp/IPEX-LLM for Intel Arc), image generation, TTS/STT, RAG + MCP, and autonomous Telegram, Matrix, Misskey & Pleroma bots. FastAPI +   SQLite, single-admin multi-user.

title: alexvilelabah/bah-browser
summary: Open-source AI browser agent — type plain-language commands and Bah operates the web for you. Works with free AI, cloud providers, or local Ollama models.

title: tonkonozhenko-mi/ai_private_workspace
summary: Local-first desktop app (macOS & Windows) to chat with your own projects — offline RAG over your files, grounded answers with sources. No cloud, no accounts.

title: EndoTheDev/OMeter
summary: Benchmark and compare Ollama models across local and cloud endpoints with rich, sortable tables.

title: Weltenwanderer1/ai-buddy
summary: AI-Buddy: your personal AI assistant as an Android app. Open source, local-first, no account required. APK builds run automatically via GitHub Actions. Bring your own keys — works with Ollama Cloud and OpenRouter. Built with Hermes Agent by @NousResearch + @OpenClaw.

title: soenneker/soenneker.maf.pool.ollama
summary: Provides Ollama-specific registration extensions for MafPoolManager, enabling integration with local LLMs via Microsoft Agent Framework.

title: heypinchy/pinchy
summary: Self-hosted AI agent platform built on OpenClaw. Enterprise-ready, offline-capable, open source. 🦞

title: zlatko-lakisic/agentic-orchestration
summary: Model-agnostic multi-agent orchestration built on CrewAI. YAML-driven agent and MCP catalogs, dynamic LLM planning, sessions, and pluggable execution — mix Ollama, OpenAI, Anthropic, HuggingFace, and your own tools without rewriting orchestration logic.

title: jorsonbei/property-state-model
summary: Experimental state-first AI control layer with deterministic evidence, risk, audit, and release boundaries.

title: heckenmann/visual-agent
summary: Visual Agent for orchestrating LLM-powered agents, sub-agents, tools, canvas workflows, workspace files, and persistent local state.

title: vinodborole/okf-kit
summary: Turn any website into a portable, agent-ready Open Knowledge Format (OKF) bundle — no LLM required. Crawl, sync, chat offline, and serve docs to coding agents over MCP.

title: Horlicks-p/mp-ukagaka
summary: Create your own ukagakas and display one of them on your wordpress blog. You can get more information about ukagaka at [Wikipedia](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ukagaka)

title: Uday170604/StayChat-AI
summary: RAG-based hotel Q&A system with hybrid FAISS/BM25 retrieval and hallucination controls.

title: open-webui/open-webui
summary: User-friendly AI Interface (Supports Ollama, OpenAI API, ...)

title: gyasis/acolyte
summary: A drop-in web chat widget that reads the page with you. Page-aware RAG, multi-provider LLMs, voice in + out with neural TTS, voice-follow scroll, persona system. One-line install.

title: kstevica/captain-claw
summary: Self-hosted framework for orchestrating fleets of specialist AI agents — ensemble reasoning and a full agentic coding pipeline, model-agnostic and local-friendly.
